name: narukami
description: NARUKAMI — a cross-platform Electron desktop app (and local web runner): register software projects by path, let Claude Code analyze how each runs, and run each command in its own live browser terminal. Runs as a native desktop window (`npm run desktop`) and packages to a self-contained desktop installer (`npm run desktop:dist`).

scripts.dev: npm run token && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.desktop: npm run build && npm run start -w desktop
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build && npm run dist -w desktop
